sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113257" key="xamaimhla=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαι-μηλᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n113257.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparation of camomile,</tr_> interpol. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
